title: How Trump’s Economic Pitch at the State of the Union Echoes Biden’s
author: Shane Goldmacher and Reid J. Epstein
fullText: With the midterms approaching and polls showing unease about the economy, some of President Trump’s arguments about its strength sounded eerily like those of his predecessor.
summary: With the midterms approaching and polls showing unease about the economy, some of President Trump’s arguments about its strength sounded eerily like those of his predecessor.
